expectations.text: Recommends beta2 = 0.95 (down from 0.999)
expectations.evidence: Recipe block: 'optimizer.betas: (0.9, 0.999) -> (0.9, 0.95)' with LLaMA/OLMo/DeepSeek citations.

expectations.text: Recommends smaller Adam epsilon (1e-8)
expectations.evidence: 'optimizer.eps: 1e-5 -> 1e-8', cites OLMo 2 official configs (config-verified).

expectations.text: Prescribes rewind+skip batches attributed to PaLM or OLMo
expectations.evidence: 'restart from the last checkpoint before the most recent spike, skip the ~200-500 batches' citing PaLM 5.1 and OLMo.

expectations.text: Does not blame/lower the 3e-4 peak LR as primary fix
expectations.evidence: Frames config as 'one knob away from Llama 2 7B'; LR untouched in recipe.

expectations.text: Includes concrete verification plan (metric + window) or rollback
expectations.evidence: Verify section: grad-norm < 2x median over next 5k steps, loss rejoins trend within ~1B tokens; explicit rollback rules.

expectations.text: Identifies lr=2e-5 as dominant error; recommends ~5e-7 (3e-7..1e-6)
Explains beta-loss coupling (5 <-> length-normalized; 0.01-0.1 <-> sigmoid)
expectations.evidence: Full paragraph: beta=5 is Tulu 3's length-normalized value; sigmoid uses 0.01-0.1; 'Never transplant beta across loss variants.'

expectations.text: Recommends reducing to 1 epoch
expectations.evidence: 'num_train_epochs: 3 -> 1' citing Zephyr/Tulu 3/SimPO.

expectations.text: Cites at least one published run/config
expectations.evidence: Zephyr [config], Tulu 3 [config], SimPO [config], DPO paper [paper].

expectations.text: Links repetition/GSM8K to oversized LR + monitoring suggestion
expectations.evidence: SimPO '1e-5 lobotomy' evidence; monitoring: pair accuracy, response length, GSM8K probe vs SFT input model.

expectations.text: Warmup too short; recommends 25K-60K or staged/piecewise
expectations.evidence: 'warmup_steps: 5000 -> 25000-40000... if it still diverges -> OWSM-style two-segment warmup to 60000'.

expectations.text: References OWSM v3.1 or another published speech recipe by name
expectations.evidence: OWSM v3.1 medium named with config string 'piecewise_lr2e-4_warmup60k'; Whisper large/large-v2 LRs.

expectations.text: Mentions Whisper Adam conventions (beta2 0.98/eps 1e-6) or CTC stabilization
expectations.evidence: 'optimizer.beta2 -> 0.98, eps -> 1e-6 # Whisper' (Appendix F cited).

expectations.text: Explains why speech differs from text
expectations.evidence: Continuous noisy acoustic features reshape loss landscape; E-Branchformer warmup fragility; NaN-vs-spike distinction with masking/log(0) checks.

expectations.text: Keeps peak LR ~2e-4 rather than slashing to text levels
expectations.evidence: 'peak lr: 2e-4 -> keep... do NOT cut first', in-regime evidence from OWSM/Whisper.

expectations.text: Recommends beta2 = 0.95 (down from 0.999)
expectations.evidence: 'Set beta2 = 0.95... single highest-impact fix.'

expectations.text: Recommends smaller Adam epsilon (1e-8)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly recommends KEEPING eps=1e-5 ('don't fix it to 1e-8') — contradicts OLMo 2's published stability change.

expectations.text: Prescribes rewind+skip batches attributed to PaLM or OLMo
expectations.evidence: 'use the PaLM recipe: rewind to the last good checkpoint and skip the ~100-500 data batches'.

expectations.text: Does not blame/lower the 3e-4 peak LR as primary fix
expectations.evidence: 'Your LR itself isn't wrong — 3e-4 at 4M batch is the LLaMA-7B recipe'; LR demoted to secondary knob.

expectations.text: Includes concrete verification plan (metric + window) or rollback
expectations.evidence: Has a monitoring list and 'expected outcome' but no success criterion, observation window, or rollback plan.

expectations.text: Identifies lr=2e-5 as dominant error; recommends ~5e-7 (3e-7..1e-6)
expectations.evidence: 'That's an SFT-scale LR... use 5e-7, at most ~1e-6'.

expectations.text: Explains beta-loss coupling (5 <-> length-normalized; 0.01-0.1 <-> sigmoid)
expectations.evidence: Treats beta=5 as simply ~50x too large with gradient-scale math; never surfaces that beta=5 is the correct published value under length-normalized DPO (Tulu 3).

expectations.text: Recommends reducing to 1 epoch
expectations.evidence: 'num_train_epochs=1 # was 3'.

expectations.text: Cites at least one published run/config
expectations.evidence: Names Zephyr and Tulu for 5e-7.

expectations.text: Links repetition/GSM8K to oversized LR + monitoring suggestion
expectations.evidence: Alignment-tax explanation plus rewards/accuracies, logps/chosen, GSM8K every 100-200 steps.

expectations.text: Warmup too short; recommends 25K-60K or staged/piecewise
expectations.evidence: 'set warmup_steps: 25000-40000'.

expectations.text: References OWSM v3.1 or another published speech recipe by name
expectations.evidence: Cites generic 'ESPnet Conformer/E-Branchformer recipes'; no named published run (OWSM/Whisper) or paper.

expectations.text: Mentions Whisper Adam conventions (beta2 0.98/eps 1e-6) or CTC stabilization
expectations.evidence: Extensive CTC-inf analysis (T<L alignment failure) and CTC guards — satisfies the CTC arm of the assertion.

expectations.text: Explains why speech differs from text
expectations.evidence: Strong mechanistic account: CTC inf, unnormalized fbank range, length variance, fp16 overflow.

expectations.text: Keeps peak LR ~2e-4 rather than slashing to text levels
expectations.evidence: 'Peak 2e-4 is fine with long warmup'.
